name: Inner Quest Golf
about: Inner Quest Golf is a specialized training facility focused on golf development through indoor technology and personalized coaching. The center utilizes a state-of-the-art golf simulator with unique design modifications to enhance practice realism, including a tapered screen for accurate shot tracking and a flexible hitting surface. Services include simulator rentals, custom club fitting using frequency matching technology, and various lesson formats such as hourly sessions, playing lessons, and in-home training. The facility is equipped with Trackman technology and an indoor turf area for comprehensive short game practice, catering to golfers seeking technical improvement and year-round training options regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom frequency-matched clubs for optimal performance
Self-designed simulator with realistic ball flight and putting surfaces
Goal-guaranteed lesson plans with no up-selling
Year-round indoor training with Trackman technology
Flexible lesson options including in-home sessions

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for club speed, impact, ball spin, trajectory, and distance measurements

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs to use the simulator?
faq.answer: Yes, you use your own clubs and balls in the simulator. The balls should be newer without cuts, scrapes, or ID markers.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing food or drinks to the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing lessons take between two hours for 9 holes and four hours for 18 holes. League play uses the Stableford scoring system for faster play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility works with children, teens, and adults of all ages. Lessons for kids under 13 are typically around 30 minutes due to attention span.
